mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM animes a WHERE a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT a.* FROM animes a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY a.average_rating DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE animes SET average_rating = #{averageRating}, rating_count = rating_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{animeId} AND deleted = 0
